**sp168996.exe**: This package creates files that contain an image of the System BIOS (ROM) for supported computer models with an S95 family ROM.

**sp170085.exe**: This package provides the Realtek High-Definition (HD) Audio Driver. Audio drivers allow the operating system to communicate with audio devices, such as speakers, microphones, and headphones.
